description_long: This rifle features a sleek, elongated design with a predominantly black body accented by gold-colored components, including the barrel, trigger guard, and buttplate. The stock is robust and adjustable, with a cheek rest and a gold-finished buttpad, suggesting a focus on precision and comfort. The barrel is long and slender, likely optimized for accuracy, and is finished in a metallic gold tone. The action area includes a visible bolt handle and a trigger guard, both in gold, with a small magazine well beneath. The rifle lacks visible optics, relying on iron sights, and the muzzle is fitted with a gold-colored device, possibly a compensator or muzzle brake. Overall, the rifle exudes a high-end, competition or precision shooting aesthetic, with a blend of functional and decorative elements.
description: A precision rifle with a black body and gold accents, featuring a long barrel, adjustable stock, and gold-finished components. The design is sleek and visually striking, emphasizing accuracy and style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the gold barrel, black stock, and gold buttplate.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the gold muzzle device.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the gold barrel, black body, and the detailed adjustable stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the gold buttplate and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
